steps.title: Goal: find an equivalent equation
steps.content: We need to find which choice is equivalent to $13x + 50 = 180$. Two equations are equivalent if they have the same solution. To find the answer, simplify the given equation by isolating the $13x$ term.

steps.title: Subtract 50 from both sides
steps.content:
Subtract 50 from both sides:

$$13x + 50 - 50 = 180 - 50$$
$$13x = 130$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
